description: Deterministic MCP service-router success, latency, failure, and authorization-denial metrics from Pronto.BillerExperience.Api OpenTelemetry.
title: IC — MCP service router

panels.title: Tool success rate (%)
panels.description: Completed tool calls divided by invoked tool calls, grouped by the canonical snake_case tool name.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let invoked = customMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name == "ic.mcp.tool.invoked"
| extend tool = tostring(customDimensions.tool)
| summarize invoked = sum(value) by tool, bin(timestamp, 5m);
let completed = customMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name == "ic.mcp.tool.completed"
| extend tool = tostring(customDimensions.tool)
| summarize completed = sum(value) by tool, bin(timestamp, 5m);
invoked
| join kind=leftouter completed on tool, timestamp
| extend success_rate_pct = round(100.0 * coalesce(completed, 0.0) / invoked, 1)
| project timestamp, tool, success_rate_pct
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Tool latency p50 / p95 (ms)
panels.description: Percentiles over exported ic.mcp.tool.duration measurements, split by tool. outcome is available as a metric dimension for success/failure filtering.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name == "ic.mcp.tool.duration"
| extend tool = tostring(customDimensions.tool)
| summarize p50_ms = percentile(value, 50), p95_ms = percentile(value, 95) by tool, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Tool failures
panels.description: Failure count by tool and coarse allowlisted category; no exception message or payload is exported.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name == "ic.mcp.tool.failed"
| extend tool = tostring(customDimensions.tool), failure_category = tostring(customDimensions.failure_category)
| summarize failures = sum(value) by tool, failure_category, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Authorization denials
panels.description: Capability-validation and payer-verification denials (failure_category=unauthorized), grouped by tool.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
customMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(timestamp)
| where name == "ic.mcp.tool.failed"
| extend tool = tostring(customDimensions.tool), failure_category = tostring(customDimensions.failure_category)
| where failure_category == "unauthorized"
| summarize denials = sum(value) by tool, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
